latestAnnouncements.title: 🏓 MPL Paddle Premier League — Coming December 2025!
latestAnnouncements.body:
MPL is proud to announce the launch of the MPL Paddle Premier League starting December 2025! This will be the first professional paddle league in our community.

📹 Promo video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

The league will feature:
• 6 teams competing over 3 months
• Full live scoring on the MPL platform
• Team ownership available for $2,000
• Prize pool: $5,000

Paddle is one of the fastest growing sports in our community. We are excited to bring it to the MPL platform with the same quality and professionalism as our cricket league.

latestAnnouncements.title: 📅 MPL Champions Trophy 2026 — Registration Open!
latestAnnouncements.body:
The biggest MPL tournament yet is coming in 2026! The MPL Champions Trophy will feature all 6 franchise teams competing in a round-robin format followed by semi-finals and a grand final.

📹 Announcement video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

Key dates:
• Registration deadline: February 15, 2026
• Tournament starts: March 1, 2026
• Grand Final: June 30, 2026

Prize pool: $10,000 for the winning team. Register your team now and be part of MPL history!

latestAnnouncements.title: MPL Paddle Division — Coming December 2025 🏓
latestAnnouncements.body: MPL is proud to announce the launch of our Paddle division starting December 2025. The MPL Paddle Championship will feature 6 teams competing in a league and knockout format. Paddle is one of the fastest growing sports in our community and we are excited to bring it to the MPL platform with full live scoring and team ownership.

announcements.title: MPL Youth Academy — Nurturing Tomorrow's Stars
announcements.body: MPL is launching a Youth Academy program for players aged 12-18. The academy will provide professional coaching, match experience, and a pathway to the main MPL league. Applications are open for the 2026 intake. This is our commitment to growing cricket at the grassroots level in our community.

announcements.title: MPL Hardball T30 Cup — Registration Now Open
announcements.body: We are thrilled to announce that player and team registrations for the MPL Hardball T30 Cup are now open! The tournament kicks off November 2025 and will feature 6 teams competing in a round-robin format. Register your team today and be part of the next chapter of MPL cricket.

announcements.title: Player Registration Open for Season 2
announcements.body: Planning ahead! MPL is now accepting player registrations for Season 2. Whether you are a professional cricketer or an enthusiastic amateur, MPL welcomes players of all skill levels. Register now to secure your spot in the next season.

announcements.title: Islamabad United Win Thriller Against Lahore Lions
announcements.body: Islamabad United chased down 144 in just 16.4 overs to beat Lahore Lions by 8 wickets. Shadab Khan led from the front with a brilliant 67* off 38 balls. The win puts Islamabad United in second place on the points table with 2 wins from 2 matches. A dominant performance that sent a message to the rest of the league.

announcements.title: Quetta Gladiators vs Multan Sultans — Epic Encounter
announcements.body: In one of the most thrilling matches of Season 1, Quetta Gladiators posted 201/5 against Multan Sultans. Shane Watson smashed 89 off 52 balls while Kevin Pietersen contributed 54. Multan fought hard but fell 23 runs short. A match that had fans on the edge of their seats from ball one.

announcements.title: Paddle Division Launching Soon! 🏓
announcements.body: MPL is expanding! We are thrilled to announce the upcoming launch of our Paddle division. Competitive paddle tournaments with full league standings, live scoring, and team ownership will be available starting Season 2. Stay tuned for more details.

announcements.title: Karachi Kings vs Lahore Lions — Match Recap
announcements.body: In a thrilling opener, Karachi Kings defeated Lahore Lions by 22 runs at National Stadium. Babar Azam led the charge with a brilliant 78 off 52 balls, while Shaheen Afridi took 3 wickets to seal the victory. A fantastic start to the season!

announcements.title: MPL Season 1 is officially LIVE! 🏏
announcements.body: The Memon Premier League Season 1 has officially kicked off! Six powerhouse teams battle it out in the most exciting T20 cricket league. Follow live scores, track standings, and cheer for your favorite team. Season runs May to October 2025.

announcements.title: Team Ownership Now Open — Own Your Team!
announcements.body: MPL is proud to announce that team ownership slots are now available for purchase. For just $2,000, you can become the official owner of one of our six franchise teams. This is your chance to be part of cricket history. Limited slots available — act fast!

announcements.title: MPL Inaugural Cup 2024 — Season Recap 🏆
announcements.body: What an incredible inaugural season! Karachi Kings lifted the MPL Inaugural Cup after a nail-biting final against Quetta Gladiators. Babar Azam was named Player of the Tournament with 487 runs across 7 matches. Shaheen Afridi took 18 wickets to claim the Golden Ball. Thank you to all teams, players, fans, and sponsors who made Season 0 unforgettable.

announcements.title: 🏆 MPL Winter T20 Blast 2023 — Full Highlights
announcements.body:
The MPL Winter T20 Blast 2023 was an unforgettable tournament! Karachi Kings dominated the competition, winning all 4 of their matches to lift the trophy. Here are the season highlights:

📹 Watch the full final: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

🎬 Season highlights reel: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

Top performers:
• Babar Azam (KK) — 312 runs, avg 78.0
• Shaheen Afridi (KK) — 12 wickets
• Kamran Akmal (PZ) — 2 fifties

Thank you to all teams, players, and fans who made this season special!

announcements.title: 🏏 Spring Cup 2023 — Quetta Gladiators Champions!
announcements.body:
Quetta Gladiators are the MPL Spring Cup 2023 champions! In a dominant campaign, they won all 4 matches including a thrilling final against Multan Sultans.

📹 Final match highlights: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

📸 Photo gallery from the final:
• https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531415074968-036ba1b575da?w=800
• https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1624526267942-ab0ff8a3e972?w=800

Shane Watson was named Player of the Tournament with 267 runs and 8 wickets across 4 matches. A truly all-round performance!

announcements.title: 🌙 Ramadan T20 Series 2023 — Lahore Lions Win!
announcements.body:
In the spirit of Ramadan, MPL hosted its annual Ramadan T20 Series. Lahore Lions edged out Karachi Kings in a nail-biting final by just 3 runs!

📹 Match highlights: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

Fakhar Zaman's 89 off 54 balls in the final was the innings of the tournament. The atmosphere at the ground was electric with fans cheering throughout.

Special thanks to all sponsors who made this Ramadan event possible. See you next year!

announcements.title: 🎉 Eid Cricket Festival 2022 — A Celebration of Cricket!
announcements.body:
The MPL Eid Cricket Festival 2022 was a 5-day extravaganza of cricket, food, and community. Islamabad United won the knockout tournament, defeating Peshawar Zalmi in the final.

📹 Tournament highlights: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

📸 Event photos:
• https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540747913346-19e32dc3e97e?w=800

Over 500 fans attended across the 3 days. The event featured live music, food stalls, and cricket clinics for youth players. A truly memorable Eid celebration!

announcements.title: 🏏 MPL Founding Day T20 — Where It All Began
announcements.body:
On March 15, 2022, MPL played its very first match — the Founding Day T20 exhibition game between Multan Sultans and Karachi Kings. Multan Sultans won by 4 runs in a thrilling finish.

📹 Watch the historic first match: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

This was the day MPL was born. From a single exhibition match, we have grown into a full multi-sport league with 6 teams, hundreds of players, and thousands of fans. Thank you for being part of this journey!

"Cricket is not just a sport, it is a community." — MPL Founder

completed.result: Karachi Kings won the Inaugural Cup by 9 runs
Quetta Gladiators won the Spring Cup by 13 runs
Lahore Lions won the Ramadan Series by 3 runs
Islamabad United won the Eid Festival by 8 runs
Multan Sultans won the Founding Day match by 4 runs

fixture.result: Islamabad United won the Eid Festival by 8 runs
Quetta Gladiators won the Spring Cup by 13 runs
Multan Sultans won the Founding Day match by 4 runs
Karachi Kings won the Inaugural Cup by 9 runs
Lahore Lions won the Ramadan Series by 3 runs
